caption: DNS Query
description: The DNS query object represents a specific request made to the Domain Name System (DNS) to retrieve information about a domain or perform a DNS operation. This object encapsulates the necessary attributes and methods to construct and send DNS queries, specify the query type (e.g., A, AAAA, MX).
name: dns_query

hostname.description: The hostname or domain being queried. For example: www.example.com

parent_domain.description: The registered domain (second-level domain) of the queried hostname.

query_length.description: The length of the DNS query message in bytes.

subdomain.description: The subdomain portion of the queried hostname.

tld.description: The top-level domain of the queried hostname.
